title: Sculk Awakening: recoded
description: This mod adds sculk bioweapon (infection but it is different)  that spread underground.
body:
# **THIS MOD IS DISCONTINUED, IT WONT RECIVE ANY FUTHER UPDATES**
(But i am working on other mod that will be much, much better.)

### -= Sculk Awakening: **Recoded** =-

This mod adds sculk infection to minecraft, but unlike "[Sculk Horde](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-horde)", this infection is bio-weapon (in lore, like FIS), and it spreads underground. Also this mod has very cool assimilation. You can start the infection by placing dont chaotic root, and waiting for the roots to active. Dont place a lot of roots, this will cause a lot of lags! (and also only place root if you dont want your world to live, system is very bad, in new mod everything will be much better.)

This mode is inspired by 'Sculk Horde', 'The Flesh That Hates' and typical infection mods.

(btw, dont even try it. It would be a mirracle if you figure out how to start and infection and this will completly annihilate your TPS and world
